title: mimulus glabratus var. jamesii
intro: Mimulus glabratus var. jamesii, also known as James' monkey flower, is a plant species native to North America, belonging to the family Phrymaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mimulus glabratus var. jamesii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedy.
